title: polystichum caryotideum var. macropterum
intro: Polystichum caryotideum var. macropterum, also known as the 'Japanese holly fern', is a variety of fern plant that belongs to the Polystichum genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its fronds are used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, poultices, and salves.
